explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Obtain external validation of AI practices or require vendor certifications.

fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

governance.findings: A press release references the proprietary development, deployment, and deliberate design of an AI-based solution. This document also references established decision-making processes for the AI-based solution.
governance.path_to_improvement: Name an AI governance body with defined mandate covering all AI use.

relevant_sources.summary: The press release for the "Zimmer Biomet WalkAI Model" provides evidence for the **governance** and **transparency** pillars of responsible AI. The document supports transparency by mentioning the AI model, algorithm, and its capabilities. Governance is evidenced by the proprietary development, deployment, and deliberate design of this AI-based solution, indicating established decision-making processes.
relevant_sources.title: Zimmer Biomet WalkAI Model

oversight.path_to_improvement: Document human review processes for AI-assisted decisions (built or vendor AI).

privacy.path_to_improvement: Document data protection practices for AI systems, including vendor AI data handling.

transparency.findings: Press releases provide transparency by stating the AI model, algorithm, and capabilities of the Zimmer Biomet WalkAI Model. They also describe the development of ML-powered decision support tools for robotic surgery, stating their potential capabilities and the aspiration to improve surgical outcomes through AI applications. Furthermore, these releases outline the nature of the AI being developed by referencing machine learning, decision support tools, and algorithms in the context of their intended use.
transparency.path_to_improvement: Publish detailed documentation (model cards, system specs) for AI systems deployed.

relevant_sources.summary: The press release for the "Zimmer Biomet WalkAI Model" provides evidence for the **governance** and **transparency** pillars of responsible AI. The document supports transparency by mentioning the AI model, algorithm, and its capabilities. Governance is evidenced by the proprietary development, deployment, and deliberate design of this AI-based solution, indicating established decision-making processes.
relevant_sources.title: Zimmer Biomet WalkAI Model

relevant_sources.summary: This press release, "HSS/Zimmer Biomet AI Innovation Center," provides evidence for the **transparency** pillar of responsible AI. The document discusses the development of ML-powered decision support tools for robotic surgery, highlighting their potential capabilities and the aspiration to improve surgical outcomes through these AI applications. The mention of "machine learning," "decision support tools," and "algorithms" in the context of their intended use supports the transparency pillar by outlining the nature of the AI being developed.
relevant_sources.title: HSS/Zimmer Biomet AI Innovation Center

summary.overall_findings: Zimmer Biomet's public disclosures include a press release that states the AI model, algorithm, and capabilities of the Zimmer Biomet WalkAI Model, documenting practices related to transparency. Additionally, published materials reference the proprietary development, deployment, and deliberate design of an AI-based solution, along with established decision-making processes, addressing governance. Overall, these materials address 2 of 7 evaluated responsible AI pillars, and no qualifying public evidence was found for the majority of the 7 evaluated pillars. This assessment draws on 10 publicly available sources.
